response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong overall software engineering capabilities and 20+ years of professional experience, the role requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows combined with either fixed-income domain expertise or capital-markets banking knowledge. The resume shows only ~6 months of professional C++ experience at National Instruments, no Windows platform specialization, and no financial services domain exposure. All three mandatory requirement categories are unmet.
strengths: 20+ years of professional development experience with proven track record progressing to Staff-level roles
Strong communication and teaching abilities demonstrated through multiple technical talks, workshops, and Selenium course instruction
CI/CD pipeline and infrastructure expertise from Altom consulting role; Java development background
concerns: Only 6 months of documented professional C++ experience (December 2014 - June 2015), substantially below the required 5–10 years
No evidence of Windows platform development; career background is predominantly web, mobile, and Linux-focused systems
Zero financial services, investment banking, or capital markets domain exposure; neither required expertise path is demonstrated
